holdings.name: Franklin Institutional U.S. Government Money Market Fund

raw.n: Franklin Institutional U.S. Government Money Market Fund

holdings.n: Franklin Institutional U.S. Government Money Market Fund

overview.description: The Franklin Investment Grade Corporate ETF (FLCO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed fund that uses a combined top-down and bottom-up approach to select investment-grade USD-denominated bonds without a duration target. FLCO was launched on Oct 3, 2016 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
